taxonomy_tree.definition: Low-profile, highly modular seating systems designed to sit entirely flush or nearly flush with the ground, emphasizing horizontal continuity and continuous spatial flow.

subtypes.definition: Units that make direct contact with the floor along their entire bottom edge, featuring no visible legs or utilizing a completely recessed, invisible plinth.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Flush Base majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Flush Base seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Flush Base profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

subtypes.definition: Floor units anchored by a visible, continuous rigid perimeter trim, typically wood or dark metallic, sitting just millimeters above the floor.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Framed Base majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Framed Base seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Framed Base profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

subtypes.definition: Floor-style massive volumes lifted slightly (2-3 inches) off the ground via structural, minimalist peg legs, allowing minimal light passage underneath.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Elevated Peg Base majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Elevated Peg Base seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Elevated Peg Base profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

A massive, spacious luxury living room featuring a U-shaped configuration of a continuous Modern Floor Majlis, showcasing varied seating capacities and modular flow. Soft, bright lighting, ultra-realistic.
A wide room shot of a L-shaped Modern Floor Majlis in a high-end minimalist villa. Soft natural sunlight through large windows, 8k resolution.
45-degree angle shot of a Modern Floor Majlis seating block, showing the base interacting with a plush rug. Elegant, quiet luxury aesthetic.
A front-facing view of a vast, continuous Modern Floor Majlis layout, seamlessly connecting across a large marble floor.
An intricate multi-module configuration of a Modern Floor Majlis in a grand Middle Eastern salon space, high ceiling, architectural photography.

taxonomy_tree.definition: Standard seating height systems utilizing pronounced, visible structural legs or high-clearance plinths, characterized by clean lines and defined armrest geometry.

subtypes.definition: Standard height seating where the base support is deeply recessed, creating a hovering or floating visual effect for the main seating volume.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Hidden Plinth majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Hidden Plinth seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Hidden Plinth profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

subtypes.definition: Systems supported by massive, distinct, dark geometric block legs, often accompanied by highly structured upper architecture.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Exposed Block Leg majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Exposed Block Leg seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Exposed Block Leg profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

A massive, spacious luxury living room featuring a U-shaped configuration of a continuous Elevated Contemporary, showcasing varied seating capacities and modular flow. Soft, bright lighting, ultra-realistic.
A wide room shot of a L-shaped Elevated Contemporary in a high-end minimalist villa. Soft natural sunlight through large windows, 8k resolution.
45-degree angle shot of a Elevated Contemporary seating block, showing the base interacting with a plush rug. Elegant, quiet luxury aesthetic.
A front-facing view of a vast, continuous Elevated Contemporary layout, seamlessly connecting across a large marble floor.
An intricate multi-module configuration of a Elevated Contemporary in a grand Middle Eastern salon space, high ceiling, architectural photography.

taxonomy_tree.definition: Seating where the backrest and armrests maintain a continuous, uniform height and depth, forming an unbroken enveloping shell.

subtypes.definition: A heavy, uniform tub-shell upper structure juxtaposed against ultra-thin, minimalist suspension hardware.
gallery: Close-up wide shot of a Cloud Base Crossover majlis sofa sitting directly on a beautiful marble floor, emphasizing its base architecture.
Isometric 45-degree view of a Cloud Base Crossover seating unit, showing the solid, uninterrupted connection between the base and the floor.
Low-angle architectural shot of the Cloud Base Crossover profile, illustrating the heavy, monolithic aesthetic with base details.

A massive, spacious luxury living room featuring a U-shaped configuration of a continuous Tub-Style sofa, showcasing varied seating capacities and modular flow. Soft, bright lighting, ultra-realistic.
A wide room shot of a L-shaped Tub-Style Hybrid in a high-end minimalist villa. Soft natural sunlight through large windows, 8k resolution.
45-degree angle shot of a Tub-Style Hybrid seating block, showing the base interacting with a plush rug. Elegant, quiet luxury aesthetic.
A front-facing view of a vast, continuous Tub-Style Hybrid layout, seamlessly connecting across a large marble floor.
An intricate multi-module configuration of a Tub-Style Hybrid in a grand Middle Eastern salon space, high ceiling, architectural photography.

product_information.design_intent: To create an uninterrupted, highly adaptable floor-level seating topography that emphasizes geometric boundaries through contrasting trim.
product_information.visual_signature: Massive, low-slung orthogonal blocks completely flush to the floor, sharply defined by high-contrast fabric piping along all major edge transitions.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 25-35cm; Total height: 60-70cm; Seat depth: 80-90cm

structure.seat_count: Modular (3 to infinite via continuous linking)
structure.arm_style: Inverted J-curve upholstered end-caps or completely armless modular ends
structure.frame_shape: Linear L-shape or U-shape configurations with Hard-90 corner abutments

distinguishing_features: High-contrast thick black piping on light fabric
gallery: A modern modular floor majlis sofa, zero ground clearance flush base, tightly upholstered in smooth matte light beige fabric, sharply defined by thick high-contrast black piping along all geometric edges, inverted J-curve armrest profile, photographed in a brightly lit minimalist white studio environment, soft showroom lighting, 45-degree isometric front view, ultra-realistic product render, 8k resolution.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Smooth Flow Piped fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.

product_information.design_intent: To introduce strong vertical rhythm and texture to heavy, monolithic floor seating without relying on loose cushions.
product_information.visual_signature: A smooth, flat, heavy seat base contrasted aggressively by a backrest featuring rigid, repeating vertical upholstery grooves.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 30cm; Total height: 65cm; Seat depth: 85cm
dimensions.scale_description: Dense, heavy bottom with visually segmented upper

structure.arm_style: Armless or utilizing movable loose primitives

negative_features: NOT tufted on the seat base
NOT featuring visible trim or wood frames
gallery: A modern floor majlis sectional sofa sitting completely flush on the ground, featuring a smooth taut white fabric seat base, contrasted by a backrest entirely covered in deep, rigid vertical channeling, modular armless design, photographed from a front three-quarter angle in a soft diffused natural light living room, hyper-detailed fabric weave, photorealistic catalog render.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Deep Channeled Back fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.

product_information.design_intent: To blend modern low-profile modularity with traditional luxury materials and explicit structural framing.
product_information.visual_signature: A heavy floor unit visually anchored by a polished dark wood perimeter base, accented by loose cylindrical cushions featuring highly ornate, radially pleated end-caps.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 32cm; Total height: 68cm; Seat depth: 85cm

structure.arm_style: Loose cylindrical bolsters replacing fixed structural arms
structure.leg_style: Continuous polished dark wood perimeter trim sitting 1cm off floor
structure.frame_shape: Orthogonal modular with rigid bottom framing

distinguishing_features: Bronze velvet loose bolsters with ruched/pleated circular ends and central tufting button
gallery: A luxury modern floor majlis sofa, framed at the bottom by a continuous thick polished dark mahogany wood trim resting just above the floor, upholstered in white fabric with a vertically channeled backrest, featuring loose bronze velvet cylindrical armrest bolsters with intricately ruched pleated ends and a central button, showroom spotlighting, realistic luxury furniture render, straight front angle.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Ornate Bolster Accent fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.

product_information.design_intent: To create a floating, high-contrast visual effect by hiding the structural base and manipulating fabric application to break up monolithic volumes.
product_information.visual_signature: A hovering, standard-height sofa where a darker secondary fabric drapes over the top ridge and down the rear of the backrest, bisecting the primary light upholstery.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 42cm; Total height: 75cm; Seat depth: 95cm

functional_features: Hovering aesthetic for smaller spatial footprints

structure.arm_style: Wide, flat, flush with backrest height

distinguishing_features: Two-tone fabric application (dark grey over top/rear, light grey front/seat)
gallery: A contemporary standalone sofa hovering on a deeply recessed invisible plinth, monolithic rectangular geometry, featuring a two-tone fabric design where a dark charcoal fabric wraps over the top and down the back of the backrest, while the front face and seat are a light ash grey smooth fabric, minimalist studio environment, soft overhead diffused light, front isometric view, photorealistic.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Two Tone Wrap fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.

product_information.design_intent: To integrate hard surface utility directly into the soft seating architecture, merging the function of a side table and an armrest.
product_information.visual_signature: A structured, plush seating system sitting on massive wooden blocks, featuring extended armrests that are flat-topped and capped with rigid, dark wood paneling.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 45cm; Total height: 78cm; Seat depth: 100cm

structure.arm_style: Wide, low, capped with flush dark wood veneer panels
structure.leg_style: Massive, visible, dark solid wood rectangular blocks
structure.frame_shape: Linear with sharp geometric armrest terminations

distinguishing_features: Integrated flat dark wood panels on armrest tops
negative_features: NOT featuring soft, sloped, or curved armrests
gallery: A highly structured elevated contemporary sofa resting on massive dark walnut rectangular block legs, upholstered in textured heavy bouclé fabric, featuring wide, low armrests that are capped with flat, flush dark walnut wood panels serving as integrated side tables, well-lit modern living room setting, cinematic lighting, 45-degree angle, photorealistic product photography.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Wood Capped Utility fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.

product_information.design_intent: To subvert the visual weight of a heavy, continuous tub shell by suspending it on delicate, impossibly thin hardware.
product_information.visual_signature: A thick, continuous C-shaped upholstered shell (back and arms uniform height) that appears to float unsteadily on ultra-thin, dark metallic stiletto legs.

dimensions.typical_proportions: Seat height: 40cm; Total height: 70cm; Seat depth: 85cm

structure.arm_style: Continuous shell, unbroken curve into backrest
structure.back_style: Uniform height with arms, wrapping inward
structure.leg_style: Ultra-thin, dark metallic cylindrical pin legs

distinguishing_features: Continuous unbroken height of arms and backrest
High-contrast structural juxtaposition (heavy top, needle-thin legs)
negative_features: NOT supported by a heavy plinth or wooden frame
NOT featuring separated or dropped armrests
NOT angular or orthogonal in the upper body
gallery: A modern tub-style hybrid armchair, featuring a thick, enveloping C-shaped upper shell where the armrests and backrest are a continuous unbroken uniform height, upholstered in smooth cream fabric, juxtaposed by being suspended on ultra-thin minimalist dark metallic pin legs, standing on a textured rug in a bright, airy architectural space, hyper-realistic, straight front profile shot.
Extreme close-up macro photography of the Metallic Pin Leg fabric and texture, showcasing the fine details, stitching, and high-quality material finish in a luxurious soft-lit environment.
